info.title: WHO PreQual Vaccine API
info.description:
Logical model for the vaccine type details
from the WHO PreQual API (ProductDetails.VaccineDetails).
Contains only vaccine-type-level fields that are stable across products.
Product-specific fields (CommercialName, RouteOfAdministration) remain on FinishedVaccineProducts.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-PreQualVaccine
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-PreQualVaccine.
